description: §8.10.7/§14.8.9 — the same loop-hoist candidate with the SELECT narrowed to non-protected columns (`id, name`) fires no E-PROTECT-003: the pre-loop cache carries no protected field, so the hoist is allowed to proceed. The clean control for the overlap reject.
rationale: §8.10.7: with the SELECT column list narrowed to non-protected columns there is no overlap with the target table's protected fields, so the batch planner records the hoist and E-PROTECT-003 stays silent.
